Generative text art

Turn sentences into a single line.

Sentence length sets each segment. The path turns left and keeps reading.

Make a composition.

Sets the canvas, path, endpoints, and highlights.
0 distinct sentences

Need text? Try a Project Gutenberg book; its headers and footers are removed automatically.

Color & highlight controls Optional

The continuous sentence path.

The composition's canvas.

Two comma-separated colors.

Sentences containing these words change color.

Used only when highlight words are present.

A generative-art experiment by Davis E. Ford.
